changes: Certain status effects granted by class and job actions will now be removed when changing areas or entering an instanced duty.
Will no longer change position when executing Final Heaven.
Will no longer change position when executing Dragonsong Dive.
Tenacity's effect on damage dealt, damage received, and HP restored has been increased.

new_content.name: Spire of Trial
new_content.description: An expansion of Stone, Sky, Sea featuring level 100 striking dummy challenges.

new_content.name: Bottled Fantasy
new_content.description: Side story quest rewarding a phial of Fantasia.

new_content.name: Enter the Viper
new_content.description: Unlock quest for the Viper job.

new_content.name: The Joy of Pictomancy
new_content.description: Unlock quest for the Pictomancer job.

new_content.name: Graphical Update
new_content.description: Implementation of improved textures, lighting, shadows, and movement physics.

new_content.name: Estate Holder Rights
new_content.description: System allowing estate owners to eject or bar characters from their property.

new_content.name: Facewear
new_content.description: A new accessory slot for eyewear separate from other accessories.

new_content.name: Mute List
new_content.description: A system to mask messages from specific characters across all characters on a service account.

new_content.name: Term Filter
new_content.description: System allowing players to mask messages containing specific words in the chat log.

housing.name: Forgotten Figure
housing.description: A furnishing item mentioned in the resolved issues.

housing.name: Imitation Magitek Repair Station (Floor Unit)
housing.description: Outdoor furnishing addressed for graphical display issues.

housing.name: Imitation Magitek Repair Station (Wall Unit)
housing.description: Outdoor furnishing addressed for graphical display issues.

housing.name: Sealing Wax & Letter Set
housing.description: A furnishing item that is now dyeable.

glamour.name: Facewear (Oval Spectacles)
glamour.description: New accessories for the head, separate from other equippable accessories, such as the 'The Faces We Wear - Oval Spectacles'.

glamour.name: Faerie Tale Prince's gear
glamour.description: Circlet, Vest, Gloves, Slops, and Boots made available to be equipped regardless of gender.

glamour.name: Faerie Tale Princess's gear
glamour.description: Tiara, Dress, Gloves, Long Skirt, and Heels made available to be equipped regardless of gender.
